title: Iskander Rocket Mod
description: Introducing the Iskander Missile Mod for Minecraft, unleashing a formidable military rocket for strategic strikes and intense battles.
body:
![Main Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8005ac7633de8a98edf1222dd3371de66d83a5ee.png)

# 📑 Description

Unleash the power of the Iskander missile in Minecraft with this explosive mod! This mod introduces a military-grade missile capable of targeting coordinates with an operational range of up to 7,000 blocks.

### ⭕️ Warning:
Ensure no blocks are directly above the missile at launch to prevent a premature explosion. Expect extremely loud engine noises during launch.

### ⭐️ Features:
- Height of the rocket: 7 blocks.
- Max range: 7,000 blocks.
- Target precision of ±3 blocks.
- Horizontally speed of the rocket: 70 blocks/sec.
- Massive explosion effect with a crater radius of 30-40 blocks.
- Lethal blast radius of 150 blocks for unarmored players.

Enjoy realistic military technology in your Minecraft world and add strategic depth to your gameplay with the Iskander Missile Mod!


# ⚙️ Recipes
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cfa007274ae6816dd68d3da50e84c0747deadba.png)
